title: Vendor Categories
subtitle: Global store types that classify every vendor

emptyState.title: No Categories Yet
emptyState.description: Create your first vendor category to start classifying shops. Restaurants, pharmacies, groceries — you decide the taxonomy.

form.createSubtitle: Add a new store type available across the platform
form.name: Name
form.isActiveHint: Inactive categories stay in the database but can't be assigned to new vendors.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be at most 500 characters

confirmDelete.title: Delete Vendor Category
confirmDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
confirmDelete.blockedDescription: This category is assigned to {{count}} vendor(s). Reassign them first, or set the category to inactive instead.
